zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan De Kirkby於1295年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾吉可比時，她的父親Sir John de Kirkby20歲，母親Margery Lathom23歲。她於1321年與Gilbert Scarisbrick在英國英格蘭藍卡爾韋斯特 藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1359年9月在她的家鄉享年64歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾韋斯特 藍卡爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan De Kirkby于1295年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾吉可比时，她的父亲Sir John de Kirkby20岁，母亲Margery Lathom23岁。她于1321年与Gilbert Scarisbrick在英国英格兰藍卡爾韋斯特 藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1359年9月在她的家乡享年64岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾韋斯特 藍卡爾。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Kirkby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Kirby
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in northern and eastern England called Kirby or Kirkby, from Old Norse kirkja ‘church’ + bȳ ‘farmstead, village’.
Irish: adopted for Ó Garmhaic ‘descendant of Cíarmhac’, a personal name meaning ‘dark son’. Compare Kerwick .
Irish: Anglicized form of Mac Geirble ‘son of Geirble’, a personal name of uncertain origin. The name is preserved in the townland name of Carrowkeribly in County Mayo.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan De Kirkby was born in 1295, in Kirkby, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John de Kirkby, was 20 and her mother, Margery Lathom, was 23. She married Gilbert Scarisbrick in 1321, in West Lancashire, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in September 1359, in her hometown, at the age of 64, and was buried in West Lancashire, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan De Kirkby est née en 1295, à Kirkby, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John de Kirkby, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Margery Lathom, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Gilbert Scarisbrick en 1321, à West Lancashire, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en septembre 1359, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à West Lancashire, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan De Kirkby 1295 in Kirkby, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Kirkby 20 und ihre Mutter Margery Lathom 23. Sie hat 1321 in West Lancashire, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Gilbert Scarisbrick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb im September 1359 im Alter von 64 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in West Lancashire, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan De Kirkbyが1295年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアキルクビーで生まれた時，父Sir John de Kirkbyは20歳，母Margery Lathomは23歳であった。1321年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアウエスト ランカシュアイアでGilbert Scarisbrickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1359年9月に故郷で64歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアウエスト ランカシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan De Kirkby(이)가 1295년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 커k비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Kirkby(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Lathom(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1321년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 웨스트 랭카실르에서 Gilbert Scarisbrick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1359년 9월 그녀의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 웨스트 랭카실르에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan De Kirkby родилась в 1295 г. в местности киркби, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John de Kirkby было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Lathom, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gilbert Scarisbrick в 1321 г. в местности вест ланкашир, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла сентябрь 1359 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности вест ланкашир, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.
